ffc2d2905da41fa502d67ed6: SELECT DISTINCT COURSE_OFFERINGalias0.START_TIME FROM COURSE AS COURSEalias0 INNER JOIN COURSE_OFFERING AS COURSE_OFFERINGalias0 ON COURSEalias0.COURSE_ID = COURSE_OFFERINGalias0.COURSE_ID INNER JOIN SEMESTER AS SEMESTERalias0 ON SEMESTERalias0.SEMESTER_ID = COURSE_OFFERINGalias0.SEMESTER WHERE COURSEalias0.DEPARTMENT = "MILSCI" AND COURSEalias0.NUMBER = 402 AND SEMESTERalias0.SEMESTER = "WN" AND SEMESTERalias0.YEAR = 2015 ;
